Class PageableSpringQueryMapEncoder

java.lang.Object
feign.querymap.BeanQueryMapEncoder
org.springframework.cloud.openfeign.support.PageableSpringQueryMapEncoder
All Implemented Interfaces:
feign.QueryMapEncoder
public class PageableSpringQueryMapEncoder extends feign.querymap.BeanQueryMapEncoder
Provides support for encoding Pageable annotated as SpringQueryMap.
Since:
2.2.8
Author:
Hyeonmin Park, Yanming Zhou, Gokalp Kuscu
